insights.mordin:
Okay, I understand you want me to process the learning results again, even though it is likely based on old data. I will proceed.

The model correctly identified Scorpio Rising as a strong divergence and potential value, which resulted in a win. Get On George and Gee Force Flyer followed. This result reinforces the significance of divergence analysis. The "Sandown_1350" race calibration has now been updated with the new learnings. Please note that this update is based on old race data from 2026-03-07.
